# Ajency.in

> Ajency.in 2.0 is the solo practice of Anuj Khurana — a Goa (India) based studio doing
> curiosity-led work on AI agents, products, and design. The original studio was founded
> in 2012, grew to ~50 people, and was acquired by Turtlemint in 2022. Anuj has since
> stepped out of full-time work and builds solo again.

Anuj takes on work he genuinely wants to think about — AI agents, technology, products,
and design. The site is a single long-form essay plus a short studio history. There is no
product, login, or API here; it is a personal/professional site.

## Pages
- [Home](https://ajency.in/): The story — "It was always about agency."
- [About the studio](https://ajency.in/about.html): History of Ajency.in (2012–2022), clients, and the nature of the work.

## Contact
- Email (best): talktous@ajency.in
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ajency-in
- Location: Panjim, Goa, India

## For agents
- Topics of interest: AI agents and autonomy, product, design, automation.
- Also happy to chat about bike trips and cocktails.
- Reach out by email rather than any form.
